listings.title: Meydan Grand Views Villa: 6BR | Massive Below-Market Deal | High ROI Investment Opportunity
listings.descriptionTitle: UNBEATABLE VALUE: 6BR VILLA IN GRAND VIEWS, MEYDAN  Grab this premium investment opportunity in one of Dubais most elite gated communities! This well maintained, mortgage-free villa is priced significantly below market value for a quick sale.
descriptionParagraphs: Location: Grand Views, Meydan (Secure, family-friendly gated community). Selling Price: AED 10,800,000 (Market Value: AED 12.1M - 14.5M). BUA: 6,439 sqft | Plot: 5,511 sqft. Condition: Original & Unfurnished.

Why this is a STEAL: Immediate Equity: Recent similar sales in the community reached AED 14.4M (Feb 2026) and AED 12.8M (Nov 2025). Rising Market: Prices in the area have increased by +4.78% in the last 6 months alone. High ROI: Estimated annual rent of AED 600,000, with some units recently renting for as high as AED 750,000.
Don't miss out on acquiring a luxury asset in the heart of Meydan at a massive discount. Contact for more details and viewings!

listings.title: 4 Bedroom Upgraded E3 Villa with Private Pool in Sidra III
listings.descriptionTitle: Beautifully upgraded E3 villa in Sidra III, Dubai Hills Estate, offering a plot size of 4,875 sqft and a built-up area of 3,593 sqft. This spacious 4-bedroom, 5-bathroom home features large windows, built-in wardrobes, upgraded parquet flooring, and an extended layout for enhanced living space. The property comes furnished with a washing machine, dishwasher, oven, and fridge. Additional highlights include a private pool, enclosed courtyard, covered parking, a fully enclosed master bedroom balcony, an extended first bedroom with integrated balcony space, an outdoor bathroom with shower and toilet, and a pergola with a dedicated BBQ areaideal for luxury family living in one of Dubai's most sought-after communities.
